# Design Systems Best Practices

> Proven patterns for design token architecture, guardrails, and component isolation.

## Entries

- [Guardrail-Driven Design System](guardrail-driven-design.md): Comprehensive design constraints document loaded as a reference file for all UI work. RECOMMENDED.
- [OKLCH Token Architecture](oklch-token-architecture.md): OKLCH color space for perceptually uniform tokens with auto-derived accessible pairs. OPTIONAL.
